---
title: "Jade Sandstedt"
subtitle: "Associate Professor of Nordic Linguistics · Volda University College"
image: images/jade.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:jade.jorgen.sandstedt@hivolda.no"
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ybvDL-4AAAAJ"
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: CV
      href: cv.qmd
---

## About me

I am Associate Professor of Nordic Linguistics at Volda University College and PI of the
[MInDReading](mindreading.qmd) project (NFR FRIPRO, 2026–2030). My research uses narrow
grammatical variation (from ongoing language change and sociolinguistic variation to
dialect contact and bidialectalism) as a window onto real-time language processing,
asking what narrow variability within and between speakers reveals about the mechanisms
of language comprehension and the nature of grammatical representations.

In my work, I combine variationist sociolinguistics with experimental methodologies
(EEG, eye-tracking, self-paced reading, speech production), with broader interests in
(morpho)phonology, (morpho)syntax, language change, corpus linguistics, and Nordic
language history.

## Current focus

- **MInDReading** (2026–2030) — a four-year NFR FRIPRO project on how dialect exposure
  and bidialectal experience shape the neural and cognitive signatures of reading and
  sentence processing in Norwegian. [Project page →](mindreading.qmd)

## Contact

- ✉️ [jade.jorgen.sandstedt@hivolda.no](mailto:jade.jorgen.sandstedt@hivolda.no)
- ☎️ +47 97 34 97 41
- 🏛️ Institute for Language and Literature, Volda University College,
  Postbox 500, 6101 Volda, Norway
- 📚 [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ybvDL-4AAAAJ)

```{=html}
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Jade Sandstedt",
  "alternateName": "Jade Jørgen Michael Sandstedt",
  "jobTitle": "Associate Professor of Nordic Linguistics",
  "url": "https://jadesandstedt.com",
  "affiliation": {
    "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
    "name": "Volda University College",
    "url": "https://www.hivolda.no/"
  },
  "sameAs": [
    "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ybvDL-4AAAAJ",
    "https://www.hivolda.no/tilsette/institutt-sprak-og-litteratur/jade-jorgen-michael-sandstedt"
  ]
}
</script>
```
